calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-17-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Dan Dodt in pro per, Respondent/Plaintiff
Not present by Appellant/Defendant

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. Stipulation to pro tem judge signed. The party was sworn and testified of his behalf.

After presented oral and documentary evidence to the court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter was taken under submission.
